manifest.name: AI-Vault

name: AI-Vault

releases.author: JamJan05
releases.description:
## AI-Vault 1.0.8

  This maintenance release addresses the findings from the Obsidian community plugin review.

  ### Fixed

  - Replaced direct `fetch()` calls with Obsidian's `requestUrl()` API.
  - Replaced static inline style assignments with CSS classes and Obsidian CSS helpers.
  - Improved type safety in external storage and removed unsafe `any` usage.
  - Fixed promise handling, unnecessary type assertions, unused imports, and other lint issues.
  - Replaced vault-wide wiki-link lookup with Obsidian's metadata cache.
  - Limited full vault enumeration to the note picker and the optional RAG index.
  - Limited clipboard access to explicit user-triggered copy actions.
  - Improved cancellation handling for active AI requests.

  ### Security and release

  - Documented desktop file-system access used by optional storage outside the vault.
  - Added GitHub Artifact Attestations for `main.js` and `styles.css`.
  - Verified with the official Obsidian ESLint rules, TypeScript typecheck, and production build.

  No configuration migration is required.

releases.author: JamJan05
releases.description:
This release adds optional API key support for Local API endpoints.

Added a new Local API key password field in Local API settings.
Local API requests now support optional Authorization: Bearer .
The key is used for both model refresh and chat requests.
Supports authenticated Ollama/OpenAI-compatible endpoints such as Ollama Cloud, LiteLLM, LocalAI, vLLM, and third-party LLM gateways.
Compatibility
Local Ollama without an API key continues to work as before.
LM Studio without an API key continues to work as before.
OpenAI and Anthropic providers are unchanged.
Notes
Leave Local API key empty for local Ollama or LM Studio.
Local API requests are sent only to the configured Base URL.

releases.author: JamJan05
releases.description:
## apikey-0.1 — Pre-release

  This pre-release adds optional API key support for Local API endpoints.

  ### Added
  - Added a new **Local API key** password field in Local API settings.
  - Local API requests now support optional `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.
  - The key is used for both model refresh and chat requests.
  - Supports authenticated Ollama/OpenAI-compatible endpoints such as Ollama Cloud, LiteLLM, LocalAI, vLLM, and third-party LLM gateways.

  ### Compatibility
  - Local Ollama without an API key continues to work as before.
  - LM Studio without an API key continues to work as before.
  - OpenAI and Anthropic providers are unchanged.

  ### Notes
  - Leave **Local API key** empty for local Ollama or LM Studio.
  - Local API requests are sent only to the configured Base URL.
releases.name: 1.0.7 beta

releases.author: JamJan05
releases.description:
## AI-Vault 1.0.4

### Changed
- Updated plugin version to `1.0.4`.
- Updated Obsidian compatibility metadata.
- Improved the release workflow used to package `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
- Updated build configuration for production releases.
- Refined plugin styling in `styles.css`.

### Fixed
- Cleaned up release automation to make published plugin assets more consistent.
- Adjusted package metadata for the release build.

### Notes
This release focuses mainly on packaging, release workflow, and compatibility cleanup rather than major user-facing feature changes.

releases.author: JamJan05
releases.description:
## 1.0.2 beta

Beta release with fixes prepared for Obsidian Community Plugins review.

This release contains the review-fix work from sessions 1–5. It is marked as beta because the plugin is still being verified before the final stable release.

### Fixed
- Security: replaced unsafe `innerHTML` usage with safer Obsidian DOM APIs.
- UI: improved Settings UI consistency by using the Obsidian Settings API.
- Theming: replaced direct inline styles with CSS classes where applicable.
- Compatibility: updated Obsidian API usage for desktop/popout compatibility.
- API: adjusted request handling for Obsidian compatibility.
- TypeScript: improved type safety, file checks, and async error handling.
- UX: replaced browser `confirm()` dialogs with Obsidian modal-based confirmations.

### Notes
- This is a pre-release build for testing and verification.
- A stable `1.0.2` release will be published after final checks.
releases.name: 1.0.2-beta
